headerTitle: Senior Customer Success Manager  ·  Enterprise AI Adoption  ·  Executive Advisor  ·  Moveworks AI Platform
subjectText: Senior Customer Success Manager — ServiceNow / Moveworks (Remote) · $113K–$177K
intro: Moveworks built the single front door to work for enterprise AI — now inside ServiceNow. The Senior CSM drives transformational AI adoption with executive sponsors at the world’s largest organizations. Six engagements built that operating model.
bullets: Trusted advisor to executive sponsors — six engagements, six leadership relationships built from scratch. Former GM with P&L ownership; I speak in executive terms: time saved, cost reduced, throughput improved, risk mitigated.

Transformational AI adoption — six complete cycles: discover the transformational goal, map current-state workflow, design AI integration, drive adoption, document the outcome. Different AI readiness on every engagement; same outcome standard.

LLM and agentic platform knowledge — 14 live endpoints using Claude, GPT-4o, and Gemini. MCP protocol, agentic workflow orchestration, and LLM integration into CRM, ticketing, email, scheduling, and communication channels. AI product fluency from shipping it.
matchNotes: Honest stretch: no formal CSM title or ServiceNow/Moveworks platform experience. Strengths are executive advisory track record (GM background), enterprise AI adoption pattern (6x FDE), and LLM/agentic system depth. Remote-West preference is a challenge from TX. Frame FDE work as structured CSM execution.
